TOMB-L252.depth_note: Claim is universal over ALL k; script blocks only to n=4 and samples 18 words (all k=2-4, 2-3/6-30 for k=5-7, 2/30 for k=8, none k>8). "Closed for all n,k" rests on a prose field-degree argument, not a machine-checked general proof. Needed: proven primitivity+simple Perron root at every n/k; a general proof T^2-4det is nonsquare for every word; full necklace coverage k=5-8 and k>8 samples.
TOMB-L252.anatomy_note: revival_hypothesis names B735: "the rank question was never asked on the emittance/spectral anatomy." Recompute (faces_consulted=none-arithmetic-only) used only the Bellissard K0/gap-labeling Z-module via substitution arithmetic, never B735's emittance-operator spectral machinery. If B735 defines a distinct spectral-rank object, rank=k was never tested against it.
